Bash(cd ~/.claude/plugins/marketplaces/claude-plugins-official && cat .claude-plugin/marketplace.json | python3 << 'EOF'
import json
import re

# Read the file
with open\('.claude-plugin/marketplace.json', 'r'\) as f:
    data = json.load\(f\)

# Fix the stagehand plugin - change "github" to "git-subdir" and add proper fields
for i, p in enumerate\(data['plugins']\):
    if p['name'] == 'stagehand' and isinstance\(p.get\('source'\), dict\):
        if p['source'].get\('source'\) == 'github':
            # Convert to proper git-subdir format
            repo = p['source'].get\('repo', 'browserbase/agent-browse'\)
            p['source'] = {
                "source": "git-subdir",
                "url": repo,
                "path": ".",
                "ref": "main"
            }
            print\(f"Fixed plugin {i}: {p['name']}"\)

# Write back
with open\('.claude-plugin/marketplace.json', 'w'\) as f:
    json.dump\(data, f, indent=2\)

print\("Done! File has been fixed."\)
EOF)

Bash(cd ~/.claude/plugins/marketplaces/claude-plugins-official && cat .claude-plugin/marketplace.json | python3 -c "
import json, sys
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
# Check for remaining problematic source formats
for i, p in enumerate\(data['plugins']\):
    src = p.get\('source'\)
    if isinstance\(src, dict\):
        src_type = src.get\('source'\)
        if src_type and src_type not in ['url', 'git-subdir', 'local']:
            print\(f'Plugin {i} \({p[\\"name\\"]}\): Invalid source type: {src_type}'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cat ~/.claude/plugins/marketplaces/anthropics-claude-plugins-official/.claude-plugin/marketplace.json | python3 << 'EOF'
import json

# Read the file
with open\('/Users/chenxi/.claude/plugins/marketplaces/anthropics-claude-plugins-official/.claude-plugin/marketplace.json', 'r'\) as f:
    data = json.load\(f\)

# Remove $schema and add metadata field
if '$schema' in data:
    del data['$schema']

# Add metadata field
description = data.pop\('description', 'Directory of popular Claude Code extensions'\)
data['metadata'] = {
    'description': description,
    'version': '1.0.0'
}

# Write back
with open\('/Users/chenxi/.claude/plugins/marketplaces/anthropics-claude-plugins-official/.claude-plugin/marketplace.json', 'w'\) as f:
    json.dump\(data, f, indent=2\)

print\("Modified marketplace.json to match expected format"\)
print\(f"Marketplace name: {data['name']}"\)
print\(f"Plugins: {len\(data['plugins']\)}"\)
EOF)
